rationale: The skill provisions Prisma Postgres via curl calls to the Prisma Management API, may direct the user to Prisma Console, installs npm packages, and runs Prisma/tsx through npx. It reads local env/config/schema files and bundled reference docs, then writes project configuration, Prisma schema/config, dependencies, migrations, generated client files, and a temporary connection test script. The verification script connects to the newly provisioned Prisma Postgres database using the returned DATABASE_URL, and the temporary script is deleted after success.
